description: Ruby script with actionpack 7.0.0 dependency but no code path reaches the vulnerable Response#body method. CVE-2022-23633 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Script only prints a message. No ActionDispatch code is used at all despite the gem being declared as a dependency.

findings.human_justification: No code in the project uses any ActionDispatch APIs. The gem is declared as a dependency but completely unused.
